sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51833" key="kaqi/mhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθῑ´μ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a letting down by a rope</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.264f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
